Class BaseContainer

java.lang.Object
entity.base.BaseItem
entity.base.BaseContainer
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bowl, Plate, Tray
public abstract class BaseContainer extends BaseItem
This class is the base class of any container entity. Each container have specific size on the screen unlike ingredient entity.
